items.title: 机构研判二季度：A股存在结构性机会，聚焦三大核心投资方向
items.summary: 步入二季度，A股迎来年报与一季报密集披露的窗口期，叠加中东地缘冲突、海外预期波动等多重因素，市场走向成为投资者关注焦点。多位专家在接受记者采访时表示，二季度A股市场大概率延续震荡蓄势格局。高油价风险抬头、中东地缘冲突持续扰动、新能源与黄金及AI算力结构性机会，将成为市场的三条核心主线。（上证报）

items.title_en: Institutional research and judgment on the second quarter: There are structural opportunities in A-shares, focusing on three core investment directions
items.summary_en: Entering the second quarter, A-shares are ushering in a window period for intensive disclosure of annual reports and first quarter reports. Multiple factors such as geopolitical conflicts in the Middle East and overseas expected fluctuations are superimposed, and the market trend has become the focus of investors. Many experts said in interviews with reporters that the A-share market is likely to continue to fluctuate and gain momentum in the second quarter. The rise of high oil price risks, continued disturbances from geopolitical conflicts in the Middle East, and structural opportunities for new energy, gold, and AI computing power will become the three core main lines of the market. (Shanghai Securities News)

items.title_en: Google announces $10 million in funding to support 40,000 manufacturing workers in acquiring AI skills
items.summary_en: On April 13, local time, Google announced a $10 million grant to support the American Manufacturing Institute to help the American workforce embrace a new era of industrial innovation. This funding will help 40,000 current and future manufacturing employees master AI skills and expand apprenticeship training opportunities to 15 regions across the United States. (interface)

items.title: 对标OpenClaw，微软拟为Copilot开发新功能
items.summary: 据报道，微软正为其AI助手Copilot开发一系列新功能，旨在使其更接近OpenClaw。微软表示，公司目前正“在企业应用场景下，探索OpenClaw等技术的潜力”。这些新特性包括在Microsoft 365应用程序内部引入一支“始终在线”的智能代理团队。（界面）

items.title_en: Microsoft plans to develop new features for Copilot against OpenClaw
items.summary_en: Microsoft is reportedly developing a series of new features for its AI assistant Copilot, aiming to bring it closer to OpenClaw. Microsoft said that the company is currently "exploring the potential of OpenClaw and other technologies in enterprise application scenarios." These new features include the introduction of a team of "always-on" intelligent agents within Microsoft 365 applications. (interface)

items.title_en: Tolerance, exploration, truth-seeking, integrity | 2026 Light Curtain Project final lineup and annual face announced
items.summary_en: When short plays become a narrative form that attracts much attention nowadays, and when AI continues to expand the boundaries of expression, the ancient art of performance also stands at a new fork in the road. Efficiency and flow have built a visible track, but the real inquiry has always sunk deep: apart from the "skills" of technology and the "speed" of media, do those clumsy and sincere "truths" originating from flesh and blood still have the power to reach people's hearts? To discern this reality requires years of hard work and professional awe. To this end, we are honored to invite Director Li Shaohong to serve as the finalist of the BE SEEN Light Curtain Project of the 16th Beijing International Film Festival...

items.title_en: Kingsoft Antivirus and 360 Security Guard were exposed to have high-risk kernel driver vulnerabilities
items.summary_en: IT House reported on April 14 that security researcher Patrick Saif (@weezerOSINT) posted a tweet on the X platform yesterday (April 13), revealing that there are high-risk vulnerabilities in the kernel drivers of two mainstream anti-virus software, Kingsoft Antivirus and 360 Security Guard. Kingsoft Antivirus' kdhacker64_ev.sys driver allocates only half the required buffer size after processing user input, causing 1160 bytes of data to be written into 584 bytes of space, directly triggering a 512-byte kernel pool overflow...
